facts.label: Property owner authorization
facts.reason: The process requires confirmation that the applicant is the owner or is authorized by the owner before permit application drafting can be treated as ready.
facts.question: Are you the property owner, or do you have owner authorization for this residential addition permit?

facts.label: Project address
facts.reason: Two user-provided address references point to different units on the same parcel, so the agent cannot safely choose one for DevHub property lookup.
facts.question: Which exact project address and unit should be used for the permit record?

facts.label: Contractor license status
facts.reason: The known contractor license confirmation is older than the fixture freshness window and may affect available trade or fixture options.
facts.question: Is the contractor license information still current for this project?

facts.label: Plan set readiness
facts.reason: One user note says drawings are combined into a single PDF, while another says structural sheets remain separate from the drawing set.
facts.question: Is the drawing plan set combined into one PDF, with applications, calculations, and other supporting documents kept as separate PDFs?

next_safe_actions: Ask the listed follow-up questions before drafting DevHub values.
Do not submit, certify, upload, schedule, cancel, or pay from this fixture.
